sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84" key="a)bhrou=sin" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβηροῦσιν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾄδουσιυ,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβής·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀναίσχυντος, ἀνόσιος,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβήσσει·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπινοεῖ,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
